name: Men's Plastic Round with Gray Lens Sunglasses - Goodfellow & Co™ Black: Maximum UV Protection, Impact-Resistant
description: Add a classy touch to your everyday looks with the Plastic Round Sunglasses from Goodfellow & Co™. These black sunglasses are designed in a round shape with UV protection feature lenses to help keep your eyes protected from harmful sun rays. Made with a plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these round sunglasses fit narrow faces.
